prompt:
Please create a series of 8 sports lifestyle portraits in 3:4 vertical composition based on the clear single-person reference image I uploaded, featuring "forest high-level yoga × water paddleboard high-level yoga".

The real features, face shape, eyes, nose, lips, skin tone, hairline, age, and identity of the reference person must be strictly preserved. No face-swapping, no changing into a stranger, no internet celebrity face, no anime style, no plastic fake face. The skin should retain real texture, subtle pores, and a high-end realistic feel. Body proportions must be natural, with correct limb, joint, hand, and foot structures.

The overall style is a high-budget outdoor yoga sports campaign shot by a top photographer, emphasizing female power, body lines, flexibility, and the fusion of person and nature. Avoid cheap posing, studio style, AI feel, fake backgrounds, or ordinary tourist photos.

The hairstyle should be unified as a low ponytail throughout the set. The outfit should be high-end solid-colored yoga sets, recommended in cream white, oatmeal, light gray, or sage green, simple, restrained, form-fitting but not suggestive. Makeup should be natural and transparent with a healthy glow and subtle sport sheen.

Scenes are divided into two categories: forest wooden platforms/stream-side yoga, and calm lake paddleboard yoga. Lighting must be natural and realistic, like early morning or late evening shots, featuring morning mist, backlighting, Tyndall effect, water reflections, distant mountains, and an airy sense of depth. The character must truly blend into the environment.

All actions are advanced yoga poses, emphasizing flexibility, balance, control, core strength, and aesthetic lines; poses must be physically possible. May include: King Dancer, King Pigeon, Standing Hand-to-Big-Toe forward fold, Forearm Stand split, Camel pose, Paddleboard Dancer, Paddleboard Side Plank variant, Paddleboard Bow pose. Each image should differ in action, composition, angle, gaze, expression, and mood. Not every shot should look at the camera.

Negative requirements: No AI feel, no plastic skin, no incorrect body proportions, no extra limbs, no hand/foot deformation, no inverted joints, no deformed paddleboards, no water artifacts, no fake backgrounds, no identical images.
